category_title: Non-compliant students who knowingly disregard directives and persist in misbehavior
scenario_title: Refusal to turn around during instructional interactions
minimal_context: The student is seated in the classroom during an instructional Q&A session.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are starting the class discussion now. Please turn around in your seat and face the front.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues facing the back of the room, talking to a classmate)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I asked you to turn around.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Does not respond or move for over 20 seconds, continuing to face away)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to turn around so we can continue.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are starting the class discussion now. Please turn around in your seat and face the front.

STUDENT: (Continues facing the back of the room, talking to a classmate)

TUTOR: I asked you to turn around.

STUDENT: (Does not respond or move for over 20 seconds, continuing to face away)

TUTOR: You need to turn around so we can continue.

STUDENT: I'm not turning around.

task.content: Instructional interactions with teachers and classmates (giving information, asking questions, and answering questions)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the teacher asks a student to turn around
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: The student does not do it
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Knowingly disregard a verbal or written behavior control directive
related_quotes: If you ask a student to turn around and the student does not do it it is the act of disobeying the teacher

behavior_patterns.condition: When the teacher attempts to control misbehavior
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Student rebellion and student off-task behavior
related_quotes: student rebellion and student off-task behavior
